CONTENT.Career: Nanasi made his full international debut for Sweden on 9 January 2023, replacing Yasin Ayari 82 minutes into a friendly 2–0 win against Finland.
CONTENT.Honours: Malmö FFAllsvenskan: 2021, 2023Svenska Cupen: 2021–22, 2023–24IndividualAllsvenskan Player of the Year: 2023Allsvenskan Midfielder of the Year: 2023
CONTENT.Personal life: Nanasi is of Hungarian descent through his grandfather. His father played floorball and, while born in Sweden, represented Hungary's national floorball team.
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of 26 July 2024Scores and results list Sweden's goal tally first, score column indicates score after each Nanasi goal.

SUMMARY: Algot Sebastian Nanasi (born 16 May 2002) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder or forward for Malmö FF and the Sweden national team.
